title: Replace stale Zephyr selectors
description: Update active workflows, scripts, README, CONTRIBUTING, and Renode documentation that invoke nrf52840_lichen, t_echo_nrf52840, rak4631_nrf52840, heltec_lora32_v3, or unsupported tbeam_supreme as west board selectors. Preserve internal model directory names where they are not commands.
acceptance_criteria: Repository search finds no active invalid west selector; commands use canonical HWMv2 selectors; shell, Python, workflow, and documentation examples validate.
close_reason: Updated stale HWMv2 selectors in lichen/README.md, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, ci.yml, renode-workflow.md, firmware-board-capability-matrix.md to canonical forms (rak4631/nrf52840, t_echo/nrf52840, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, t_deck/esp32s3/procpu). Updated matrix labels, CI matrix, docs examples, and build commands for v3.7.0 west manifest compatibility. No active invalid selectors remain in commands. Evidence: grep for old selectors now only in historical/comments or Renode platform paths.
